---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill or workflow
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you running into?

<!-- Describe the gap or limitation you hit. Be specific — vague requests are hard to act on.
     Good: "The skill always uses Inter but my app uses a custom font and the AI ignores it."
     Not helpful: "More font options." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What change to SKILL.md, the workflow, or the demo would fix it?
     If you're not sure, describe the desired outcome and let the maintainers figure out the approach. -->

## Example of the desired output or behavior

<!-- If it's a visual change, sketch it or describe it concretely.
     If it's a workflow change, write out the new step-by-step. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out. -->

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] I can help test/review but not implement
- [ ] Just suggesting — happy for someone else to pick it up

## Additional context

<!-- References, prior art, links to similar tools, or screenshots that support the idea. -->
